checks.finding: AC-005 requires that WFI-010.md/WFI-011.md's real recorded Audit-Attempt/Audit-Status values be 'asserted consistent with the AC-003 rule.' The AC-003 rule is a strict binary mapping (Audit-Attempt>=3 -> Human-Blocked, else Not-Started) defined for a synthetic 0->1->2->3 fixture sweep. investigation.md INV-007 documents that WFI-010.md:44-56 actually records Audit-Attempt: 1 with Audit-Status: Human-Pending, and INV-005/INV-006 confirm the real state machine has 5 valid Audit-Status values (STEP 9, SKILL.md:239: PASS -> Human-Pending), a state the binary rule never produces. 'Consistent with the AC-003 rule' is not concrete enough: one implementer would assert literal equality (expect Not-Started for attempt=1) and get a red TEST-005 against real on-disk data at HEAD; another would build a one-directional check (attempt<3 => status != Human-Blocked) that is nearly vacuous against the only two real documents named. Two implementers would reasonably build different, materially different behavior from the same sentence.

No direct conflicts found between REQ-001..REQ-006, AC-001..AC-019, or the Non-goals list. Scope-limiting statements are consistently mirrored between requirements.md and acceptance-tests.md. The AC-005/AC-003 issue is filed under AMBIGUITY rather than here because the defect is under-specification of 'consistent,' not two requirements asserting incompatible facts.

acceptance-tests.md's Notes explicitly pair every new suite with a negative/boundary path: TEST-001/TEST-002 (never-reproduces vs. reproduces-on-iteration-3), TEST-003's rule-threshold-mutation self-check, TEST-006's threshold-0 negative self-check, TEST-008/TEST-009 (changed-files-only PASS vs. full-directory FAIL). The attempt 2->3 boundary is directly swept by AC-003's 0->1->2->3 sequence. Failure modes for already-existing, previously-verified functionality are correctly left untested here, consistent with the calibration guard against redundant coverage.

All 4 listed Assumptions are either self-evidently stable and cited or explicitly caveated with a named re-verification trigger. All 7 Open Questions (OQ-1..OQ-7) carry an explicit RESOLVED disposition with a citation; none are left as silent, unmarked assumptions.

The wfi-audit-cycle skill's human-approval and gh-issue-creation step (SKILL.md STEP 8) is kept categorically unreachable by construction (the suite never invokes the skill) and is independently made testable via AC-004's grep-based self-check that no new file invokes gh. Non-blocking note: AC-005's real-file-immutability claim lacks a named verification mechanism — see B-2 (Minor); insufficient to fail this check since it protects read-only reference documents, not an approval/governance transition.

For 18 of the 19 acceptance criteria this specification is unusually handoff-ready: every REQ cites file:line evidence, every AC maps 1:1 to a TEST ID, the Field Definitions section resolves the cross-cutting terms, and all 7 Open Questions are pre-resolved with citations. AC-005/TEST-005 is the exception: its test author cannot implement it without silently choosing between two materially different consistency checks against real data, and the specification gives no basis to choose between them.
